selections.name: All Jokes Aside
selections.reason: Dropping in from Turfway Park and Churchill Downs, this gelding holds a massive class edge over these regional runners. Speed figures are superior.

selections.name: Button Box
selections.reason: Consistent turf sprinter with a 108 speed figure. Should get a favorable pressing trip just off the early speed.

selections.name: Maxwell Esquire
selections.reason: Classy veteran with a 106 speed figure. Has back class from stronger circuits and can close late.

selections.name: Pallino
selections.reason: Draws inside and possesses enough tactical speed to stay in the mix. Form is solid with a 101 speed figure.

danger_horse.name: Tap Em
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the rail and has a 104 speed figure. Could save ground and sneak into the exotics.

selections.name: Quince
selections.reason: Taking a massive class drop from Churchill Downs and Turfway Park maiden special weights into a low-level claimer. Huge edge.

selections.name: Clearly Inish
selections.reason: Another dropping out of MSW company. Has tactical speed and should appreciate the softer competition here.

selections.name: Black Bety
selections.reason: Has shown flashes of ability and gets a good inside draw. Speed figure of 84 puts her right in the mix for a share.

selections.name: My Angel Does
selections.reason: Drawn the rail and will be saving ground throughout. 5/2 morning line suggests respect from the oddsmaker.

danger_horse.name: Dancing Shadows
danger_horse.reason: Has an 83 speed figure and could pick up the pieces if the pace collapses.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #8, Exacta Box 8-9, Trifecta 8,9 / 1,2,8,9 / ALL

selections.name: Beautiful Crazy
selections.reason: BEST BET - Golden Gap overlay. Ships in from Gulfstream Park with a 108 speed figure and 102 class rating. Massive edge over this field.

selections.name: Too Fast For You
selections.reason: Dropping from Churchill Downs and Keeneland. 99 speed figure and 101 class rating makes her a co-standout with the top pick.

selections.name: Little Bit Of That
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 97 speed figure. Should get a good stalking trip behind the top two.

selections.name: Mornin' Boss
selections.reason: Has early speed and could factor into the pace scenario. 95 speed figure is competitive for underneath.

danger_horse.name: Miss Fussy Pants
danger_horse.reason: Drawn the rail and has a 91 speed figure. Could hang on for a minor award.

selections.name: Royal Salute
selections.reason: Boasts a field-best 115 speed figure and 91 class rating. If he translates that form here, he will be tough to beat.

selections.name: Westhampton
selections.reason: Has a 103 speed figure and draws well inside. Should get a ground-saving trip.

selections.name: Abrams
selections.reason: Solid 95 speed figure and fits well at this claiming level. Should be rolling late.

selections.name: Bosley
selections.reason: Rail draw and a 90 speed figure. Will need a clean trip but has the numbers to compete.

danger_horse.name: State Of Attack
danger_horse.reason: Has a 90 class rating and could wake up at a price.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #10, Exacta Box 2-10, Trifecta 2,10 / 1,2,5,10 / ALL

selections.name: My Brothers Angel
selections.reason: Class standout with a 96 class rating. Draws well and should get a perfect pressing trip.

selections.name: Dancing King
selections.reason: Highest speed figure in the field (86). Will be dangerous if allowed to dictate terms.

selections.name: Fernando's Gold
selections.reason: Consistent runner with an 85 class rating. Should be in the mix late.

selections.name: Union Branch
selections.reason: Rail draw and a 78 class rating. Can save ground and hit the board.

danger_horse.name: Candy Connection
danger_horse.reason: Has an 84 speed figure and could surprise at a price.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #2, Exacta Box 2-5, Trifecta 2,5 / 1,2,3,5 / ALL

selections.name: Princess Azara
selections.reason: Class edge with an 89 class rating. Drawn the rail and should get a great trip.

selections.name: Face Of Shadows
selections.reason: Highest speed figure in the field (90). Will be a major threat if she clears early.

selections.name: Baytown Munny
selections.reason: Solid 80 speed figure and 82 class rating. Outside draw keeps her out of trouble.

selections.name: Sperry Chalet
selections.reason: Consistent form and should be tracking the leaders.

danger_horse.name: Mazarn
danger_horse.reason: Has an 82 speed figure and could factor into the exotics.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #1, Exacta Box 1-2, Trifecta 1,2 / 1,2,4,7 / ALL

selections.name: Renege
selections.reason: Massive speed figure advantage (107). Should dominate this field if he runs to his numbers.

selections.name: Souper Justified
selections.reason: Solid 89 speed figure and 80 class rating. Logical alternative if the top pick falters.

selections.name: Semper Anticus
selections.reason: Has an 88 speed figure and should get a good trip from the middle of the pack.

selections.name: Firestorm Dancer
selections.reason: Speed figure of 83 puts him in the mix for the lower exotics.

danger_horse.name: Pop Neigh
danger_horse.reason: Could save ground and clunk up for a minor share.

selections.name: Breezer
selections.reason: Standout speed figure of 110 and class rating of 89. Should be very tough to beat in this spot.

selections.name: Out Of Cents
selections.reason: Solid 98 speed figure and 89 class rating. Will be closing late.

selections.name: French Onion
selections.reason: Has a 101 speed figure and draws well inside. Should be prominent early.

selections.name: Speighty War
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 99 speed figure. Fits well for underneath.

danger_horse.name: Stormy Hollow
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw and a 91 speed figure. Could save ground and hit the board.

selections.name: Shiva
selections.reason: Highest speed figure (95) and class rating (78) combination in the field. Should get a good trip.

selections.name: Zaddy
selections.reason: Morning line favorite with a 90 speed figure. Draws well and will be dangerous.

selections.name: Canavall
selections.reason: Rail draw and a 90 speed figure. Can save ground and factor late.

selections.name: Classic King
selections.reason: Solid 88 speed figure and fits well at this level.

danger_horse.name: Bailamos
danger_horse.reason: Has a 95 speed figure and could surprise if the pace sets up right.
